message:
feat(vector): add vector index reader with file loading and mmap support

- Add load_from_file() method to VectorIndex for reading persisted index files
- Add load_from_file_or_storage() fallback method that tries file first, then DB
- Add MmapVectorIndex for memory-mapped file access with type-aware filtering
- Add DocTypeFilter struct for efficient document type filtering
- Add dot_product_f16_simd function for direct F16 SIMD operations
- Add fmmap dependency for memory-mapped file I/O
- Add comprehensive unit tests for reader functionality

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
